title: agrostis salmantica
intro: Agrostis salmantica, also known as the Spanish bent-grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Agrostis salmantica can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in some traditional remedies in the form of a poultice or salve to treat skin conditions and other health issues.
